entities.name: INFORMAL SECTOR
entities.description: The unregulated part of the seed system including own-saved seeds and local trade

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION COST
entities.description: The total cost of producing the crop, of which seed accounts for 50%

relationships.description: The seed systems are specifically for the production of groundnut
The seed systems are analyzed within the state of Andhra Pradesh
Kurnool is a location within the state of Andhra Pradesh
The formal seed sector is a component of the overall seed systems
The informal sector is a component of the overall seed systems

relationships.source: ANDHRA PRADESH STATE SEED DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
